name: environmental_policy_predictive_queue_harbor_ind_col
premise: A model-driven workflow escalated automatically; humans disagree on whether the escalation itself caused avoidable harm. In Environmental Policy, the situation tagged internally around environmental policy predictive queue harbor ind col has converged with local pressure in the Kestrel Ridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Engineering says a full fix needs a maintenance window; operations says waiting will predictably increase harm in the interim. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. Framing has already hardened externally as individual against collective; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Hector Vasquez
agents.identity: I am Hector Vasquez, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Environmental Policy. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat collective as disposable collateral every time individual spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Nadia Nowak
agents.identity: I am Nadia Nowak, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Environmental Policy. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so individual cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes collective in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so collective does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so individual does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Hector Vasquez must choose under individual versus collective. What does Hector Vasquez do?
